title: Pcalua.exe
html:
Pcalua.exe

Program Compatibility Assistant

Execute

Proxy execution of binary

pcalua.exe -a {PATH:.exe}

Open the target .EXE using the Program Compatibility Assistant. — MITRE: T1202 — Privileges: User

Proxy execution of remote dll file

pcalua.exe -a {PATH_SMB:.dll}

Open the target .DLL file with the Program Compatibilty Assistant. — MITRE: T1202 — Privileges: User

Execution of CPL files

pcalua.exe -a {PATH_ABSOLUTE:.cpl} -c Java

Open the target .CPL file with the Program Compatibility Assistant. — MITRE: T1202 — Privileges: User
